alerts.headline: 3 insiders bought EWSB ($1.6M)
alerts.why: 3 insiders put personal cash into EWSB (Savings Institutions, Not Federally Chartered). Clustered open-market buys are the strongest documented edge — insiders sell for many reasons but buy for only one. Valuation gate: cheap (1.00).
